scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @sentinel/security-core && npm run build -w @sentinel/evidence-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/attack-path-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/policy-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/audit-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/scan-guard && npm run build -w @sentinel/finding-lifecycle && npm run build -w @sentinel/pr-diff-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/compliance-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/reporting-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/integration-security && npm run build -w @sentinel/resilience-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/quota-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/observability-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/data-governance && npm run build -w @sentinel/disaster-recovery && npm run build -w @sentinel/supply-chain-security && npm run build -w @sentinel/identity-governance && npm run build -w @sentinel/incident-response && npm run build -w @sentinel/asset-discovery && npm run build -w @sentinel/network-topology && npm run build -w @sentinel/secret-detection && npm run build -w @sentinel/cloud-posture && npm run build -w @sentinel/kubernetes-security && npm run build -w @sentinel/container-runtime-security && npm run build -w @sentinel/ai-intelligence && npm run build -w @sentinel/enterprise-core && npm run build -w @sentinel/posture-intelligence && npm run build -w @sentinel/plugin-sdk && npm run build -w @sentinel/db && npm run build -w @sentinel/scanner-runner
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @sentinel/web && npm run build -w @sentinel/worker
scripts.test: npm-run-all test:core test:evidence test:attack-path test:policy test:audit test:scan-guard test:lifecycle test:pr-diff test:compliance test:reporting test:integration-security test:resilience test:quota test:observability test:data-governance test:disaster-recovery test:supply-chain test:identity-governance test:incident-response test:asset-discovery test:network-topology test:secret-detection test:cloud-posture test:kubernetes-security test:container-runtime test:intelligence test:enterprise test:posture test:scanner test:worker test:web
scripts.typecheck: npm-run-all typecheck:web typecheck:worker typecheck:core typecheck:evidence typecheck:attack-path typecheck:policy typecheck:audit typecheck:scan-guard typecheck:lifecycle typecheck:pr-diff typecheck:compliance typecheck:reporting typecheck:integration-security typecheck:resilience typecheck:quota typecheck:observability typecheck:data-governance typecheck:disaster-recovery typecheck:supply-chain typecheck:identity-governance typecheck:incident-response typecheck:asset-discovery typecheck:network-topology typecheck:secret-detection typecheck:cloud-posture typecheck:kubernetes-security typecheck:container-runtime typecheck:intelligence typecheck:enterprise typecheck:posture typecheck:db typecheck:scanner typecheck:plugin-sdk
scripts.verify: npm run verify:static && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
